titleStmt.title: SII 18.246: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 246. CHAUḌADĀNPUR, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Stone set up in the Muktēśvara temple.

summary.p: This composite record contains five grants, two of which refer themselves to the reign of Mahādēvarāya. The first of these is dated in Śaka 1185, Dundubhi, Vaiśākha śu. 15, Monday, lunar eclipse. The date is irregular. On the tithi cited there was no lunar eclipse nor was it a Monday. The tithi corresponds to A.D. 1262, May 5, Friday. It records a grant of land made by Bomma-gavuṇḍa, son of Rāma-gavuṇḍa of Bevoḷal (apparently mistake for Beḷuvoḷal), under the orders of the Gutta chief Guttarasa, who was ruling at Guttavoḷal. His genealogy is given. The second one was made at the command of the king by Dēvarasa, the Mahāpradhāna and Sarvādhikāri of Toṟagale. It is dated in the following year, viz., Rudhirōdgāri Jyēshṭha ba. 5, Sunday, Shaḍas11īti-saṁkrānti, corresponding to A.D. 1263, May 27, Sunday on which day the Shaḍaśīti-saṁkranti occurred. The tithi on this day was however, s11u. 3. The recipient of these gifts was the saint Śivadēva of Muktikshētra who is described as having taken his birth on earth at the desire of amara-gaṇas and whose saintly qualities are highly extolled.

The other three grants were apparently engraved on the stone later. The first which is undated was made by Guttarasa himself, probably sometime after the above grants were made. The second one is dated during the reign of Siṅghaṇadēva Śubhakṛit, Pushya śu. 3, Friday, corresponding regularly to A.D. 1242, December 26 Friday. It states that the Mahājanas of Gōpe and Kuṟuvattī made gifts to Śivadēva The third one is dated in the 16th year of the reign of Rāmadēva, Vyaya. The further details of the date are lost. During the reign of Rāmadēva i.e., Rāmachandra the cyclic year coincided with A.D. 1286-87. It records a grant of land and money made to the god Muktēśvara.
The land measures Gaṅgana-mattaru and Gaṅgana-kaṁba are mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© Ōṁ nama śivāya . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhā
ya śaṁbhavē . śabdādayōpi gruhyaṁtē kriyaṁtē vacanādayaḥ . Avilaṁghyā hi sarvēṣāmājñā śaṁ
bhōrggarīyasī . śrīmuktīśvaranatuḷaprēmadi rakṣisuge bagamananupamalakṣmī dhāmanagaṇyamahō
dayanāmaṁ ś®timauḷiraṁjitaśrīcaraṇanu . svasti samastasurāsuragaṇakiṁnara kiṁpuruṣaga
ruḍagaṁdharvvasiddhavidyādharapannagapramukhanākinikāyavinamitaprōdyaduttuṁga makuṭataṭapaṭughaṭita
caṁcaccaṭucaṭuḷamaṇimāṇikyaśrēṇikiraṇāruṇamarīcimanjarīraṁjitaśrīpādapadma . satya samudi
tasatkriyōpakṛtakkriyākāṁḍaphalānapēkṣitanirastātiśayanityōtsavōdagrapratyagrī kṛtaharāmaḷacaraṇa
dhyānanirddiṣṭāparōkṣajñānasiddhaśivayōgārūḍhagūḍhanivāsanijasadma . pṛthuḷakaṭitaṭō paśōbhitama
hāpadma . kaparddabaṁdhāṁtaraṁgaraṁganarttitamaṁdākinītuṁgataraṁgākuḷōccaḷa dviśada viśuda(ddha)kīrtti
karapallavēva cūḍāgrakhacitacārucaṁdrakaḷāvataṁsa . Ābī(bhī)ḷabā(bhā)ḷabhujaṁgayugaḷa kuṁḍaḷamaṁḍitakarṇnā
vataṁsa . mahāviṣṇukaṁkā(ka)ṇabhṛtavāmāṁsa . Ātimathanasaṁbhūtābhīḷa hāḷāhaḷa kāḷakūṭakapiśanīlagrī
va . Āciṁtyaprabhāva . śrīmahādēva . yeṁdasaṁkhyātāmaragaṇaṁgaḷu stōtraṁ geyvuttamire śrīkaiḷāsa
nivāsiyiṁteṁdaṁ . � . stutigēṁ kāraṇa pēḷimeṁdene gaṇaṁgaḷu biṁnapaṁ dēva duḥkruta diṁ dharmmavaḍaṁgi
pōytu kalikālaṁ percce cārbbāka saugata bauddhāgama varttisuttamide lōkā lōkamaṁ pāḷipoḷmatiyaṁ
māḷpude kajjaveṁdu nuḍiyalu śrīpārvvatīvallabhaṁ . Ākṣayanidhāna muktiya dīkṣāsthaḷa tuṁgabhadre pa
ścimamukhadinaghakṣayamaṁ māḍalu taddakṣiṇataṭadalli meṟagu muktikṣētraṁ . Alliddu mūṟu lōkada
rellara pāvanava māḷpanenutagajātāvallabhanavatarisida bhūvallabheganurāgamappinaṁ muktīśanu . liṁ
gavavatarisitāhā hiṁgade nāvippa(ppe)veṁdasaṁkhyātarbhbhū (.) raṁgakke baralikamaragaṇaṁgaḷa mōghājñe
yiṁda śrīśivadēvanu . [Uda]yisidanagrajanmada padadoḷtanuguṇavanoṁdadellāga madoḷmadanavirō
dhiye śrautōditadēvanenutta tiḷidu śrīśivadēvadēvanu . Āśrama nālkuṁ tiḷi yalanāśramavāśramamane
ydadaśramadinda . vāśramavinihitaveṁdatyāśramamaṁ dharisi meṟada śrīśivadēvanu . liṁgavanappida tō
ḷgaḷinaṁganeyaranappenaḷipi nōḍeṁ kūḍeṁ ma . naṁgoḍenavadhārenutavabhaṁgabrati śaṁkaraṁge bāseya koṭṭanu
. va . mattamanēka bhāseyanīśaṁge koṭṭu . kaṁ . taledaṁḍa svarggamuktiya phalavanapēkṣi sidenādaḍele śaṁkarā kēḷ sa
le puṁṇyapāpaveraḍaṟa phalavallada nityapūjeyaṁ māḍidapeṁ . Endu druḍhasaṁkalpanāgi . Āseya pāsa
maṁ paridu rōsada mīseya kittu kāma bēḍōsariseṁdu lōbhamadamaṁ bedaṟaṭṭuta mānamōhatṛṣṇāsa
balaṁgaḷaṁ jaṟadu baggisi gelduṟe tottumāḍidaṁ dūsakadhūmakētu śivadēvanatarkkya guṇaprabhāvana .
meṭṭida kalikiyanoṟeyaṁ kaṭṭida nūṟeṁṭu byādhigōṁ nama śivayeṁdiṭṭaṁ vibhūti tilakava kaṭṭāḷcha
ladaṁkamanadoḷatisiḥsaṁkanu . jaḷa modalāgire pattujvaḷavenipa snānameṁṭu pattaṟoḷide nirmmaḻaveni
pudeṁdu bhasmadi toḷedaṁ karmādimavanī śivadēvanu . Āṁkege jhaṁkege manadoḷsaṁkisidaḍe niṁna bha
ktarāṇele paśupati . śaṁkaranoḷādoḍaṁ bēḍeṁ kēḷ bēḍidaḍe yeṁna taleye daṁḍavu . Āṇakadaṇi
kalige muṁkaṇi seṇasuva vādigaḷge bāyasaṇi jagavaṟiyare (.) guṇi sakaḷavēdaśāstrada kaṇi śivatatvānubhāva
śī śivadēvanu . śivasadvidye ye vidyeyeṁdu śivabhāvaṁ bhāvaveṁduvā śivamaṁtraṁgaḷe maṁtraveṁdu śivamūrttidhyāThedye is written above the line.The letters bhāvam are written above the line.
nave dhyānavī śivanityōtsavavutsavaṁ śivakathāḷāpaṁgaḷāḷāpa mikkavasēbyaṁgaḷenutta vīra śivadēvaṁ tāḷda
vīrabrataṁ . śivanaṁ tōṟuva mārgga mārgga śivasadācāraṁgaḷācāravī śivasaṁ yōgave yōga nityaśivapūjākaThe letter ga is written above the line.
rmmave karmmavī śivanē dēvanu dēvananyaviṣayaṁ bēḍallaholleṁdu śrīśivadēvaprabhu vettidaṁ dhvajapatākōddaṁ
ḍamaṁ daṁḍamaṁ . Elagaḷa vādigīdi paḍa vaiṣṇavagīṣṇava sauragivura māṇelagaḷa boṁmigiṁmi nigamārththa
vanaṟiyada yajvigijvi bēḍelagaḷa bauddhagiddha baṟiyāgami gīgami maṁtravādi sākuli yadi
reṁdu baggipudu śrīśivadēvana kālahoṁdoḍaru . beraḷaṁ karcci karaṁgaḷaṁ mugidu bāyaṁ pā
yuvaṁtameraḍkaradiṁ muccuta bāyiviṭṭu kusipoṁmeyyikkutaṁ palgaḷaṁ kiridaṁbe śaraṇārtthi
yeṁdanudinaṁ ṣaḍdarśanaṁ bāhuli bharadoḷtaḷteḷaluttavirdduvaniśaṁ śivadēva vāmāṁ ghriyoTheva is written above the line.
ḷu . va . mattaṁ duṭṭagharaṭṭaliṁgakke kaṭṭidoṟe koṭṭabāse diṭṭivāriya kaṭṭāḷu śivadēvaṁ śrījyōtināthaThe letter va is written above the line.
ne muktanāthaneṁdaṟidu . kālakalkiyaṁ jaṟadu . tanuguṇaṁgaḷaṁ meṟadu . Āvaraṇaṁgaḷaṁ to
ṟadu . Ubhayakarmmada bēṟaṁ koṟadu . madanaśaraṁgaḷaṁ muṟidu . māyāpāśamaṁ paṟidū .
kaṁ . mānasavācikakāyikavēnuṁṭaḍagire niṁna bhaktaroḷaniśaṁ . sānaṁdadiṁda māḷpeṁ nānanyava neneTheniṁ is written above the line.
ye nuḍiye māḍe kūḍeṁ . va . Iṁtenutta dēvalōkadalli koṭṭapratijñeyaṁ tiḷitiḷidū . niṣṭhisi
nōḍuta muḷidānuṣṭhānaṁ pollaveṁdu kaṁḍā śivapadaniṣThe nelegoḷalu śrīṣṭhānuṣṭhānava mā
ḷpananudinaṁ śivadēvanu . liṅgakke jaṁgamakkaṁ hiṁgade dāsitvamāḷpude besanendā saṁ
ganabasavaṁ besase manaṁgoṁḍarccisuvanubhayaliṁgava mudadiṁ . mṛḍagaṇavaraprasada ma paḍedaṁRead sā.The letter da is written above the line.
jagavaṟiyalaṁdu saṁganabasavaṁ . paḍedā prasādasiddhiya kaḍuvīrabratadi paḍedanī śivadēvanu . va .
mattaṁ satyagaṇaṁgaḷa nityaprasādasaṁpannanāgi hiṁgade liṁjgārccanaṅgeyvuttamireyire . © svasti
śrīmatu yādavarāyanārāyaṇaṁ bhujabaḷaprauḍhapratāpacakravartti śrīvīramahā
dēvarāyavijayarājya pravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ vuditōdita baruttamire .
© svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ Ujjayanīpuravarā dhīśvaraṁ caṁ
draguptānvayaṁ guttakuḷakamaḷamārttaṁḍa kadanapracaṁḍa haṁnibbaragaṁḍa maṁḍaḷika bhairavaṁ śaraṇā
gatavajrapaṁjaraṁ śrīsparśaliṁga gē(ga)ḷaganāthadēvara dibyaśrīpādapadmārādhakanappa śrīvīravikramaṁgaṁ ma
hādēviyarigaṁ puṭṭida vikramāṁkana prabhāvameṁteṁdoḍe . dharmmada permmane satyada nirmmaḷateya
gottu kavijanaṁgaḷa kaḍavara . kūrmmeya tāyvane jāṇina nirmmāṇada ratnakaḷaśa vikrama bhūpanu .
Ā vikramanṛpaṁgaṁ mayiḷaladēviyarigaṁ puṭṭida guttanripana prabhāvamaṁ pogaḷvaḍe .
© dikkāṁtājanatālalāṭapaṭaḷaprōdbhāsiratnōjvaḷādēśaḥ sajjanacittavṛttivibhava prakhyātakīrttidhva
jaḥ . satyōtsāhasukhābdhivarddhanayaśaḥ kaumōdinīvallabhaḥ śrīmānbhūpativikra māṁkatanujaṁ(ḥ)
śrīguttabhūpāḷakaḥ . kaṁ . . Ā vikramana parākramavā vikrama nolavāvu dāra tanagogeyeBetween ma and no some letters seem to have been engraved and later on erased.
budharggīveḍeyoḷu śaraṇeṁdara kāveḍeyoḷu bhūmipaṁgārssariyē . malapa virōdhi vairiga
ḷa gaṇḍa raṇāṁgaṇadoḍarddu beṁbalavane porddu piṁtaḍiyaniḍvara gaṇḍanidircci bercci kakkuliteya mā
ḍuvaggaḷada vīrara gaṁḍanā sāhasakke meygaliyenisippa toṇḍaroḷu gaṁḍara gaṁḍanu
guttabhūbhujanu . va . mattaṁ daśadigvaḷayaṁgaḷayaṁgaḷaṁ parbbida kīrtti kāṁteyiṁ vīra vi
taraṇaṁgaḷaṁ pogaḷisikoṟetta nijarājadhāni guttavoḷaloḷsukharājyaṁ geyivutta mirddū
. kaṁ . caṁḍāsiya paṁnirbbarmmaṁḍaḷikara gaṁḍaneṁba jasavesayitu bhū(.)maṁḍaḷa vaṟeyalu śivane
gaṁḍanenippoṁdu kīrttiyaṁ paḍedirppanu . va . yiṁtenutta taṁnoḷ paribhāvisi nōḍi . kaṁ . dhāriṇiyoḻu
gratapadiṁ vīrēśvaranolava paḍeda śavadēvayyana (.) kāruṇyavenage jīvana bēṟelleṁdaṟedu tatprasāda
va paḍedanu . Āṁtu śivagaṇaprasādadiṁ śivadēvara kāruṇyavaṁ paḍedu śrīsōmanāthaliṁga
vanavadharisikoṁba samayadalli guttarsaru śrīśivadēvara śivapādaṁgaḷigeyārādhaneya mā
ḍida śivapurakke bevoḷala rāmagavuṁḍana maga boṁmagavuṁḍanaṁ karasi bevoḷala baḍaga
ṇa koladalli gaṁganāṟu mattaru yereya keyyanikkeṁdaḍadā boṁma gavuṁḍa kharoḷḷitu ma
hāprasāda jīyayeṁdu . guttoḷalnāḍaprabhugaḷaṁ muṁde kayikoṁḍu taṁna sthaḷada he
ggaḍe muddayya mukhya samastapraje prakruti yeṁṭuhiṭṭu paṁcamaṭha nakhara muṁmuridaṁ
ṇḍa sahita baṁdu . tana gavuḍageyiṁ baḍagaṇa basavayyana keyiṁ mūḍalu . ci
kkakuṟuvattiya holavēreya sālabeḷaniṁ teṁkalu . yeṁṇnegoḷa kaḍagada koḷaniṁ pa
ḍuvalu (.) kalidēvara (.) kaṁmāṟageyiṁ baḍaga teṁkasthaḷadali yikkida yereya bhūmi gaṁgana
mattarāṟu . Ā bhūmiya phala bevoḷala kāraṇavilla . śakavarṣa 1185 neya dundu
bhisaṁvatsarada vayiśākha śuddha 15 sōmavāra sōmagrahaṇadaṁdu śrīmadamara gaṇaṁ
gaḷa nijasiṁhāsanavappa muktikṣētrabhūkayiḷāsavideṁdu . śrīśivadēvaru jagaddhitā
rtthavāgi racisida (.) śivadēvapurakke varṣaṁprati baruttabahudu . Ādu sarvvamānya . śrīmānya .
jayamānya . vijayamānya . © mattaṁ svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabdadvārāvatīpurava rā
dhīśvara suvarṇnagaruḍadhvajaṁ vṛṣṇivaṁśōdbhavaṁ yādavakuḷakamaḷakaḷikāvikāsabhāskaraṁ Arirā
yajagajhaṁpa māḷavarāyamadanatrinētraṁ gaurjjarabhayajvaraṁ cōḷarāyadesā (diśā) paṭṭateluṁ
garāyasthāpanācāryya Ityādi rājāvaḷīsamāḷaṁkṛta śrīmatpauḍhapratāpacakravartti śrī
mahadēvarā vijayarājya pravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkaṁ baruttamire . kaṁda . dakṣiṇadikutaṭa
viḷasitalakṣumige nīnadhipaneṁdu yādavabhūpa nirīkṣisi besasalu mudadiṁ rakṣipa toṟagaleya
dēvarasa janapadavam . va . śrīśivadēvaru māḍuva liṁgajaṁgamasamārādhanege sarvvabhāvadiṁ śuśrū
ṣeya mārppudeṁdu śrīmahadēvarāya nirūpaṁgoḍe svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahā
pradhānaṁ sarvvādhikāri toṟagaleya dēvarasaru śrīmaddakṣiṇavāraṇasiyenipa pa ścimavāhini tuṁ
gabhadreya dakṣiṇatīradoḷeseva muktikṣētranivāsarappa śrīśivadēvara liṁgadarśanārtthaṁ baṁdu . ru
dhirōdā(dgā)risaṁvatsarada jyēṣṭha bahuḷa 5 Ādivāra ṣaḍaśītimukhasaṁkrānti tātkāladalli be
ḻuvoḷala baḍagaṇa kolanalli muṁna kallu naṭṭidda gaṁgana yeṁṭu mattaru bhūmiyanu
sarvvanamasyavāgi samārādhaneya māḍidanu . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śivamastu .
© mattaṁ guttarasanu [Ā] beḷuvoḷala paḍuva volanalli hoṁnavattige hōda dā
riya baḍagaṇa yereya keya gaṁgana kaṁba 50 maṁ voḍeyara pādakke
Ārādhisidanu . Ā keyyanu voḍeyaru basavayyaṁge sārvvanamasyavāgi koṭṭaru is written above the line.
ru . © śrīmatu siṁghaṇavaśra(rṣa) śubhakrutsaṁvatsarada puṣya suddha 3 sukravāra
da sivadēvara kayyalu gōpe kuṟuvattiya yaśēṣamahājanaṁgaḷu hoṁge tiṁgaḷiṁ
śrīrāmadēvarāya vijayarājyōdayada 16 ne
ya byayasaṁvatsarada yaṁtara yā mahājanaṁgaḷu yā dharmmava naḍasiyalliṁ
daṁ mēle gaṇaṁgaḷa samakṣadalli yā muktēsvaradēvaru siddhāya
va teṟuva yāṟu mattaru keyi yaivattu hoṁniṁgevu baḍḍigevu selavāgi yā bhū
miyanu kuḷava kaḍidu yā mahājanaṁgaḷu muktēsvaradē sarvva mānyavāgi koṭṭaru . yī dharmmake
yāru yahudalleṁ sāsirake hoṟagu hadineṁṭu sameyake drōhigaḷu .
svadattaṁ sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 18.246 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
